translations.### 從 iOS 9 到 iOS 12 推播通知權限狀態處理(Swift)\n: ### Handling Push Notification Permission Status from iOS 9 to iOS 12 (Swift)
translations.#### 1. 首先宣告全域 notificationStatus 物件\n\n: #### 1. First, declare a global notificationStatus object
translations.#### 2. 構建檢測通知權限狀態的方法：\n\n: #### 2. Build a method to check notification permission status:
translations.***notificationStatus 使用 Observable 請注意記: ***When using Observable with notificationStatus, pay attention to memory management: release when necessary (to prevent memory leaks) and retain when needed (to avoid losing observation).**
translations.**以上還沒結束！**\n眼尖的朋友應該在≤ iOS 9的判斷之中發現”iOS9:
**Not finished yet!**  
Sharp-eyed readers might have noticed the custom UserDefaults key "iOS9NotificationIsDetermined" in the ≤ iOS 9 check. So, what is it used for?
translations.**由於我們的專案支援範圍是iOS 9 ~ iOS12，iOS 8未進行任何測試: **Since our project supports iOS 9 to iOS 12, iOS 8 has not been tested and its support level is uncertain**
translations.**請注意！！跳到APP的「設定」頁時請勿使用**\n\n: **Please Note!! Do NOT use when jumping to the APP's "Settings" page**
translations.**通知權限狀態的物件、檢測的方法都構建好後，appDelegate裡我們還要再: **After setting up the notification permission status object and detection methods, we also need to add the following in appDelegate…**
- nil = Object initializing... checking...

- notDetermined = The user has not been asked whether to receive notifications

- authorized = The user has been asked about receiving notifications and tapped "Allow"

- denied = The user has been asked whether to receive notifications and selected "Don't Allow"
translations.1. If the user disables notifications, w:
1. If the user disables notifications, we can prompt them on specific feature pages to go to Settings and enable them.

2. After navigating to the Settings page, if the user enables or disables notifications, returning to the app should update the status accordingly.

3. If push notification permission has never been requested, ask for permission; if it has been requested but denied, show a prompt; if it has been requested and allowed, proceed with the operation.

4. Support for iOS 9 to iOS 12
translations.1~3 都還好，使用 iOS 10 之後的Framework UserNotif: 1 to 3 are fine. Using the UserNotifications framework from iOS 10 onward can handle most cases well. The tricky part is item 4: supporting iOS 9. Handling iOS 9 requires using the old registerUserNotificationSettings method, which is not easy. Let's take it step by step!
translations.> ***When using Observable with notifica: > ***When using Observable with notificationStatus, pay attention to memory management: release when necessary (to prevent memory leaks) and retain when needed (to avoid losing observation).**
translations.> **Please Note!! Do NOT use when jumpin: > **Please Note!! Do NOT use when navigating to the APP's "Settings" page**
translations.> The above is just sample code; actual: > The above is just sample code; actual use and triggers can be adjusted as needed.
translations.> Using this method to redirect **will c: > Using this method to redirect **will cause app rejection! Will cause app rejection! Will cause app rejection! (Personal experience)**
translations.APP初始跟從背景返回都要再檢測一次推播狀態如何\n\n: How to check the push notification status again when the app launches or returns from the background?
translations.authorized = 已詢問過使用者要不要接收通知且按「允許」\n: authorized = The user has been asked about receiving notifications and tapped "Allow"
translations.denied = 已詢問過使用者要不要接收通知且按「不允許」\n: denied = The user has been asked whether to receive notifications and selected "Don't Allow"
translations.notDetermined = 未詢問過使用者要不要接收通知\n: notDetermined = The user has not been asked whether to receive notifications
translations.notificationStatus/NotificationStatusTyp: The four states of notificationStatus/NotificationStatusType correspond to:
translations.並在 appDelegate 中 didFinishLaunchingWithO:
Handle checking the push notification permission status and update the notificationStatus value in appDelegate methods: didFinishLaunchingWithOptions (when the app initially launches), applicationDidBecomeActive (when returning from background), and didRegisterUserNotificationSettings (for push notification requests on ≤ iOS 9).  
Pages that need to respond will trigger corresponding actions (e.g., showing an alert if notifications are disabled).
translations.主因是≤iOS 9的檢測推播權限方法只能用獲取目前的權限有哪些作為判斷，若為空則: The main reason is that in iOS 9 and below, the method to check push notification permissions can only determine the current granted permissions; if it's empty, it means no permission. However, it will also be empty if the user has never been asked before. This causes a problem: has the user never been asked, or have they been asked and denied?
translations.以上只是範例Code，實際應用、觸發可再自行調校\n\n: The above is just sample code; actual use and triggers can be adjusted as needed.
translations.以上就是檢測的部分，再來我們來看如果是未詢問該怎麼處理要求通知權限\n\n: That covers the detection part. Next, let's see how to handle requesting notification permission if it has not been asked yet.
translations.使用者若關閉通知功能，我們能在特定功能頁面提示他去設定開啟\n: If the user disables notifications, we can prompt them on specific feature pages to go to settings and enable them.
translations.動態變更狀態的部分，因為notificationStatus物件我們使用是Obs: For dynamically changing the status, since the notificationStatus object we use is Observable, we can add an observer in the viewDidLoad where we need to monitor the status constantly:
translations.接續前一篇「 [什麼？iOS 12 不需使用者授權就能傳送推播通知(Swift): Continuing from the previous article "[What? iOS 12 Can Send Push Notifications Without User Authorization (Swift)](https://medium.com/@zhgchgli/%E4%BB%80%E9%BA%BC-ios-12-%E4%B8%8D%E9%9C%80%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E8%80%85%E6%8E%88%E6%AC%8A%E5%B0%B1%E8%83%BD%E6%94%B6%E5%88%B0%E6%8E%A8%E6%92%AD%E9%80%9A%E7%9F%A5-swift-ade9e745a4bf?fbclid=IwAR1AKi3io4Jt-rFFgrLWEFsmA0lKYVFUD7Dw9n9LpMa2zAzJCHeGGGgn9Vs){:target="_blank"}" about optimizing the push notification permission process, after the improvements made in the previous Murmur section, a new requirement has arisen:
translations.方式跳轉， **會被退審! 會被退審! 會被退審! （親身經歷）**\n\n: Using this method to redirect **will cause app rejection! Will cause app rejection! Will cause app rejection! (Personal experience)**
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.檢測跟要求都處理完囉，我們來看看如何應用\n\n: Both detection and request are done. Let's see how to apply them.
translations.沒詢問過推播權限時詢問權限，有詢問過但是不允許則跳提示，有詢問過又是允許則能繼續: If push notification permission has never been asked, request permission; if it has been asked but denied, show a prompt; if it has been asked and allowed, proceed with the operation.
translations.跳轉至設定頁後，若有打開/關閉通知的操作，回到APP要能跟著更改狀態\n: After navigating to the Settings page, if the user enables or disables notifications, returning to the app should update the status accordingly.
translations.這邊我使用了一個自訂的UserDefaults iOS9Notification: Here, I used a custom UserDefaults key iOS9NotificationIsDetermined as a flag, and added the following in appDelegate's didRegisterUserNotificationSettings:
translations.適配 iOS 9 ~ iOS 12 處理通知權限狀態及要求權限的解決方案\n\n: Solution for Handling Notification Permission Status and Requests Compatible with iOS 9 to iOS 12
translations.首先宣告一個全域的 notificationStatus物件 儲存通知權限狀態: First, declare a global notificationStatus object to store the notification permission status, and add property observation on the pages where handling is needed (here I use [Observable](https://github.com/slazyk/Observable-Swift){:target="_blank"} to subscribe to property changes; you can choose suitable KVO or use Rx, ReactiveCocoa).
